description: Pack file header followed by an offset table. Each pack holds a contiguous block of task binary records. Only top-level tasks appear in the offset table; sub-tasks are embedded recursively inside their parent records and must be extracted by following the LoadBinary sequence.

fields.name: magic
fields.description: Pack magic number, validated on load.

fields.name: item_count
fields.description: Number of top-level task records in this pack (= entries in the offset table).

fields.name: offsets
fields.description: Byte offsets from the start of the file to each top-level task's fixed-data block. Used for direct seek access. Sub-tasks do NOT have entries here.

notes: After the header the file contains task binary records back-to-back.
Each record starts with 2490 bytes of fixed data (ATaskTemplFixedData), followed by variable-length sections.
Sub-tasks are written inline after their parent's variable sections; see task_record.json for the full LoadBinary sequence.
